entries.description: Switch the model tier used by all agents. Profiles: budget (haiku), balanced (haiku+sonnet), quality (opus). Edits agent frontmatter based on .claude/model-profiles.json.

entries.name: doc-code-drift-detector

frontmatter.description: Internal validator -- invoked by quality-gate-orchestrator. Detects drift between docs/*.md pattern documentation and what scripts/skills actually implement. Flags outdated patterns, missing validations, and version mismatches.

entries.name: quality-gate-orchestrator
entries.description: Internal validator -- invoked for quality gate runs. Unified quality gate that performs all 4 individual gate checks (script-parity, skill-script-alignment, template-sync, doc-code-drift) and produces a single pass/fail report with token cost measurement.

frontmatter.name: quality-gate-orchestrator
frontmatter.description: Internal validator -- invoked for quality gate runs. Unified quality gate that performs all 4 individual gate checks (script-parity, skill-script-alignment, template-sync, doc-code-drift) and produces a single pass/fail report with token cost measurement.

frontmatter.description: Pre-publish scan for debug flags, dev URLs, placeholder text, secrets, and disabled security. Use before any release build.

entries.name: script-parity-validator
entries.description: Internal validator -- invoked by quality-gate-orchestrator. Validates that PowerShell and Bash script pairs are functionally equivalent. Checks flags, output format, and exit codes between scripts/ps1/ and scripts/sh/.

frontmatter.name: script-parity-validator
frontmatter.description: Internal validator -- invoked by quality-gate-orchestrator. Validates that PowerShell and Bash script pairs are functionally equivalent. Checks flags, output format, and exit codes between scripts/ps1/ and scripts/sh/.

entries.name: skill-script-alignment
entries.description: Internal validator -- invoked by quality-gate-orchestrator. Verifies that Claude commands in .claude/commands/ match their script implementations. Checks flags, arguments, and documented behavior against actual script parameters.

frontmatter.name: skill-script-alignment
frontmatter.description: Internal validator -- invoked by quality-gate-orchestrator. Verifies that Claude commands in .claude/commands/ match their script implementations. Checks flags, arguments, and documented behavior against actual script parameters.

entries.name: template-sync-validator
entries.description: Internal validator -- invoked by quality-gate-orchestrator. Validates that setup/templates/ and setup/copilot-templates/ are synchronized with .claude/commands/. Checks every command has a wrapper template and a Copilot prompt.

frontmatter.name: template-sync-validator
frontmatter.description: Internal validator -- invoked by quality-gate-orchestrator. Validates that setup/templates/ and setup/copilot-templates/ are synchronized with .claude/commands/. Checks every command has a wrapper template and a Copilot prompt.
